---
title: "NEEPS poster supplemental materials"
pagetitle: "Supplemental materials markdown for my poster at the 2026Northeastern Evolutionary Psychological Society conference"
description-meta: "Lucas Watson is a Ph.D. student at Kansas State University studying dynamic human decision-making from a behavioral and ecological perspective."
title-block-banner: "#cdd99a"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "sm"
---

## Game

Here is a video playthrough of each level. 

{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/PER_TSR3iPc?si=aTIk5BgaFVC6qMd1>}}

Check out how data are tracked in real time.

{{<video data_tracking_lvl_10_video.mp4>}}

## Model

Here is where you can view more detail of the final model I summarized on the poster.
